text:
In a small town nestled by mountains, there lived a curious cat named Mittens. Mittens loved exploring every nook and cranny. Once, while investigating an old oak tree behind the grocery store, she discovered a tiny spiral notebook filled with poetry. Perplexed but charmed by the beautiful verses, Mittens brought it up to her whiskers to read.

Each day after wandering home, Mittens returned to that tree, picking up the notebook. She read each poem aloud, feeling warm spots bloom on her little nose. One poem in particular spoke to her heart:

* "In the quiet of the dusk, I find my beauty.*" 

Applying that wisdom to her own life, Mittens decided her own quiet moments were her greatest beauty. So, every evening, instead of prowling the town, she'd curl up on a patch of sunlight-dappled gravel under the oak tree.

Sometimes, to pass the time, she'd write her own verse. She wrote about
